requirement_text: Initialize SQLite database with urls table (id short_code original_url clicks created_at)
notes: Foundation -- all API endpoints depend on storage

requirement_text: Generate unique 6-8 character alphanumeric short codes
POST /shorten accepts JSON url and returns short_code and short_url
GET /:code redirects to original URL with HTTP 301
GET /stats/:code returns JSON with short_code url and clicks
Reject non-URL input on POST /shorten with HTTP 400
Reject empty body on POST /shorten with HTTP 400
Return HTTP 404 for unknown short codes on GET and stats
Rate limit POST /shorten to 10 requests per minute per IP
Comprehensive test suite runnable with single command
notes: All endpoints and edge cases covered
